name: Amazon Titan Text (Express & Lite)

price.provider: AWS Bedrock (Titan Text Express; Titan Text Lite is $0.30/$0.40 per M tokens)

note: Amazon's original Bedrock-native text duo predating Nova: Express (8K ctx, English + 100 languages in preview) and Lite (4K ctx, English-only, tuned for fine-tuning).
verificationNotes: Confirmed real via AWS 'What's New' post (GA 2023-11-29, re:Invent 2023) and independently via SiliconANGLE coverage. Confirmed Express: 8K context, English + 100 languages in preview, $0.80/$1.60 per M tokens ($0.0008/$0.0016 per 1K). Confirmed Lite: 4K context, English-only, tuned for fine-tuning, $0.30/$0.40 per M tokens. All values match; no changes. Note: record intentionally combines two variants into one row using Express's spec as primary (ctxK=8); this is a simplification but not an error, and is disclosed in the note/price fields.
